title: Homework 3 Evaluating Financial Performance - Cash Lens
description:
Homework 3.xlsx Download Homework 3.xlsxPlease use the spreadsheet attached to work through the questions provided.

Answers are also provided in the spreadsheet.

I strongly recommend that you do the work yourself before the spreadsheet answers.
descriptionText:
Homework 3.xlsx
    

Download Homework 3.xlsxPlease use the spreadsheet attached to work through the questions provided.
Answers are also provided in the spreadsheet.
I strongly recommend that you do the work yourself before the spreadsheet answers.

questions.text:

THEN, calculate the Net Cashflows from Operations.
(format answer as ##,###)
